documentation_impact.rationale: The compliance-tests slice includes non-work structural artifacts and this audit adds gate artifacts under internal/work_archive/173009_04-27-26/68576_0457_compliance-tests.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: The slice preserves staged-local workflow and gate semantics, and records mandatory documentation-impact outcomes.

policy_alignment.prd_alignment: The slice preserves phase-appropriate manual-first delivery while deferring runtime automation through backlog tracking.
